name: suggest_connections
description: Suggest other memories that share distinctive keywords (length>=4, non-stopword) with a target memory but aren't already linked. Use to find candidate `[[wikilinks]]` to add.

identifier.description: The memory to find related notes for.

cwd.description: Optional. Absolute path used to discover the hub by walking up for `.bridgememory/`. Defaults to the server's process cwd.
